plan.title: QA Findings Remediation — Document Q&A Assistant (Revised)

tasks.description: VERIFY: Check verify_remediation.py line 24-27 for inverted logic. If finding is valid (reports PASS when should FAIL), fix the logic. If code is correct, document why and mark finding as false positive.
tasks.acceptance: Verification complete: either fix applied or finding documented as false positive with explanation

tasks.description: Replace Path.walk() with os.walk() in bundle_embedding_model.py (batch1-CF001) for Python 3.10/3.11 compatibility at line 66. Use os.walk() with Path() wrapping to maintain same output format.
tasks.acceptance: scripts/bundle_embedding_model.py uses os.walk() and works on Python 3.10, 3.11, 3.12+

tasks.description: Consolidate duplicate validate_url() functions (batch7-005) — Create shared security.py module with context-aware validator. Strict policy (api_server) is default; add allow_local flag for llm_interface when RAG_USE_LOCAL_LLM=true. api_server.py:32-97 and llm_interface.py:36-104 both import from security.py.
tasks.acceptance: Single validate_url() in security.py with allow_local parameter, api_server uses strict mode, llm_interface uses permissive mode for local LLMs, all SSRF tests pass

tasks.description: VERIFY: Check document_processor.py lines 155-168, 229-236 for chunk_overlap=0 infinite loop. If finding is valid, add validation to reject chunk_overlap=0. If already guarded (line 211), document as false positive.
tasks.acceptance: Verification complete: either validation added or finding documented as false positive with explanation

tasks.description: Add authentication to API endpoints (batch2-F002) — Implement FastAPI OAuth2PasswordBearer with JWT for programmatic access and API-Key fallback for GUI. Add ENABLE_AUTH env var (default False). Create auth middleware at api_server.py:590-733. Add python-jose[cryptography] dependency.
tasks.acceptance: All API endpoints require auth when ENABLE_AUTH=true, supports both JWT Bearer and X-API-Key headers, unauthorized requests return 401, tests verify auth enforcement, migration guide documented

tasks.description: Remove or implement streaming /ask endpoint documentation (CF-002) — Check if streaming is implemented in api_server.py. If not, remove streaming claims from USAGE.md:788-809. If partially implemented, complete implementation or remove docs.
tasks.acceptance: Documentation matches implementation — either streaming works or docs don't claim it exists

tasks.description: Wire RAG_MIN_SIMILARITY environment variable (CF-002) — Create config.py with Pydantic BaseSettings. Add RAG_MIN_SIMILARITY with validation. Replace manual os.getenv() in api_server.py:518 and engine_factory.py:193-204. Fail fast on invalid values.
tasks.acceptance: RAG_MIN_SIMILARITY env var is validated and used in similarity threshold calculations, pydantic BaseSettings handles all config, tests verify wiring and validation

phases.name: P0 Critical Test Fixes — False Confidence

tasks.description: Replace mocked API endpoint tests with real RAG pipeline tests (batch4-CRITICAL-2) — Create tests/integration/ directory. Use httpx.MockTransport for mock LLM server. Mark as @pytest.mark.integration. Rewrite tests/test_api.py:45-63,79-101,136-153,168-188,212-225,251-260 to test actual engine behavior with real dependencies.
tasks.acceptance: Integration tests use real RAG engine with mock LLM transport, test actual query/response flow, marked @pytest.mark.integration, skip in CI unless RUN_INTEGRATION=true, all tests pass

tasks.description: Fix GGUF path wiring tests to test real code (batch4-CRITICAL-3) — Rewrite tests/test_gguf_path_wiring_final.py:11-120 to verify actual GGUF loading with real llama-cpp-python, not mock interface. Mark as integration test.
tasks.acceptance: GGUF tests verify real model loading, not mock calls, tests pass with actual llama-cpp-python or skip with clear message if not installed

tasks.description: Fix RAG engine tests to not mock all dependencies (batch4-CRITICAL-4) — Rewrite tests/test_rag_engine.py:139-226 to test real query behavior. Use real vector store and query transformer, mock only LLM calls via transport.
tasks.acceptance: RAG engine tests use real dependencies (vector store, query transformer), query returns actual results not canned data, LLM mocked via transport not full dependency mock

tasks.description: Fix llama_cpp test skip logic (batch4-CRITICAL-1) — Ensure tests/test_llm_interface.py:230-235 properly handles missing llama_cpp with clear skip message. Use pytest.skip with descriptive reason.
tasks.acceptance: Test clearly reports when llama_cpp not installed using pytest.skip with descriptive reason, doesn't silently pass

tasks.description: Fix version bump script regex (CF-001) — Update scripts/version_bump.py:13-17 to match actual README.md format or update README to have Version: field. Ensure regex works with current README structure.
tasks.acceptance: version_bump.py successfully finds and updates version in README.md

tasks.description: Fix build_installer.py hardcoded model mismatch (batch1-CF002) — Change Qwen3-1.7B to Qwen2.5-1.5B at line 135 to match README.md specification
tasks.acceptance: build_installer.py references Qwen2.5-1.5B consistently with README.md

tasks.description: Fix env var parsing for non-integer values (batch2-F010) — Use Pydantic BaseSettings validation in new config.py. Replace manual parsing in engine_factory.py:193-204. Raise ValidationError on bad values.
tasks.acceptance: Non-integer env vars raise clear ValidationError with field name, pydantic handles all type coercion

tasks.description: Fix api_server.py hardcoded embedding_model (batch7-014) — Use RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL from Pydantic settings at line 524 instead of hardcoded value
tasks.acceptance: api_server.py reads embedding_model from config (RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL env var), tests verify

tasks.description: Fix BM25 O(n²) rebuild performance issue (batch2-F007) — Optimize vector_store.py:109-117 to avoid full rebuild on every add_documents. Use incremental index update if rank-bm25 supports it, or batch updates.
tasks.acceptance: BM25 index updates incrementally or in batches, add_documents performance is O(n) not O(n²), tests verify performance with timing

tasks.description: Fix BM25 index rebuild exception swallowing (batch2-F013) — Add proper error handling in vector_store.py:218-246. Log exceptions and re-raise, don't silently swallow.
tasks.acceptance: BM25 rebuild exceptions are logged and propagated, not silently swallowed

tasks.description: Fix blocking filesystem check in engine_factory.py (batch3-F005) — Make line 217-218 non-blocking using asyncio.to_thread or similar
tasks.acceptance: Filesystem check doesn't block event loop, uses async method or thread pool

tasks.description: Fix security scans || true in CI (batch1-CF013) — Remove '|| true' from .github/workflows/security.yml:28 so failures fail the build
tasks.acceptance: Security scan failures fail the CI build, not silently pass

tasks.description: Fix pytest continue-on-error in CI (batch1-CF014) — Remove continue-on-error: true from .github/workflows/test.yml:40
tasks.acceptance: Test failures fail the CI build, not silently continue

tasks.description: Fix workflow_dispatch input validation (batch1-CF003) — Add validation for inputs in .github/workflows/release.yml:34 using GitHub Actions input constraints
tasks.acceptance: Workflow inputs are validated before use, invalid inputs fail fast with clear error

tasks.description: Fix subprocess.run to use sys.executable (batch1-CF010) — Change 'pip' to sys.executable -m pip in scripts/build_installer.py:52-63
tasks.acceptance: build_installer.py uses sys.executable -m pip for reliable Python environment execution

tasks.description: Fix CORS allow_origins hardcoding (batch7-015) — Make CORS origins configurable via RAG_CORS_ORIGINS env var (comma-separated) in api_server.py:556-561
tasks.acceptance: CORS allow_origins reads from RAG_CORS_ORIGINS env var, parsed as comma-separated list, defaults to ['*'] for development

tasks.description: Fix bare except: pass in version_bump.py (batch1-CF009) — Replace with specific exception handling at line 44 (FileNotFoundError, PermissionError)
tasks.acceptance: Specific exception types caught, all others propagated

tasks.description: Fix ingest endpoint directory traversal via CWD (batch2-F003) — Validate paths in api_server.py:211-236,632-656 using path normalization and containment checks
tasks.acceptance: Ingest endpoint rejects paths outside allowed directories, path traversal attempts blocked with 403 error

tasks.description: Fix health check test hardcoded strings (batch4-HIGH-4) — Improve tests/test_api.py:29-37 to verify actual health status from /health endpoint
tasks.acceptance: Health check test verifies actual system health indicators from response, not just hardcoded strings

tasks.description: Fix real TCP connection in test (batch4-HIGH-5) — Mock network calls in tests/test_llm_interface.py:302-305 using httpx.MockTransport
tasks.acceptance: LLM interface tests mock network connections, don't make real TCP calls

tasks.description: Fix empty test with wrong import (CF-006) — Correct import in tests/test_phase1_adversarial.py:144-150,177-181 to import actual function being tested
tasks.acceptance: Test imports correct function, validates actual behavior with assertions

tasks.description: Fix 4 tests with only pass or try/except/pass (CF-005) — Implement tests/test_phase1_adversarial.py:182-232 with actual assertions
tasks.acceptance: All 4 tests have meaningful assertions that verify expected behavior

tasks.acceptance: Test has meaningful assertion verifying expected behavior

tasks.acceptance: Test verifies expected behavior with assertions, exceptions indicate test failure

tasks.description: Fix Pydantic v2 deprecation (batch4-HIGH-6) — Replace .dict() with .model_dump() in tests/test_api.py:92,107,118,144,159
tasks.acceptance: All Pydantic model serialization uses .model_dump(), tests pass with Pydantic v2

tasks.description: Fix PyInstaller support claim (batch3-F003) — Check app_paths.py:2-6,15. If _MEIPASS support missing, either implement it (detect frozen, use correct paths) or remove claim from docstring
tasks.acceptance: PyInstaller support either works (detects _MEIPASS, uses correct paths) or docstring doesn't claim it

tasks.description: Fix build.py OpenVINO comment (batch3-F004) — Update comment at lines 62-64 to reflect GGUF usage instead of OpenVINO

tasks.description: Fix Inno Setup script placeholders (batch1-CF006) — Replace 'Your Company Name' and placeholder URLs in scripts/build_installer.py:156-201 with actual values
tasks.acceptance: Inno Setup script has actual company name and URLs, no placeholder values

tasks.description: Fix performance token/sec claims (batch6-001) — Add empirical evidence or qualify claims in README.md:22,43,50,56 with measurement conditions

tasks.description: Fix context_truncation documentation (batch6-004) — Make configurable via RAG_CONTEXT_TRUNCATION env var or align CONFIGURATION.md:545 with rag_engine.py:19 hardcoded value
tasks.acceptance: context_truncation is either configurable via env var or docs match hardcoded value

tasks.description: Fix GUI chunk_size range mismatch (batch7-006) — Align app_gui.py:230 with api_server.py:429 and rag_engine.py:48 using shared config constants
tasks.acceptance: GUI chunk_size range matches API and engine (100-10000 or consistent subset), uses shared config

tasks.acceptance: All model references consistent (Qwen2.5-1.5B)
